issues.comment: The return dict uses `monitor_environment.monitor.config` (the original, unmodified config) instead of the local `config` variable. The function creates a copy of `monitor.config` and transforms `schedule_type` to its human-readable display value, but then never uses this modified copy. The fix is to change `"config": monitor_environment.monitor.config` to `"config": config`, so that the `schedule_type` display transformation is actually included in the returned context.
